common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

error_list.name: follow_prize.campaign_none
error_list.description: The promotion id is not existed

error_list.name: follow_prize.campaign_num_max_limit
error_list.description: Max number of follow Prize reached (1000 ongoing and upcoming follow Prize)

error_list.name: follow_prize.campaign_overlap
error_list.description: Another Follow Prize voucher already exists during this time period, please set another period.

error_list.name: Follow_prize_min_value_basket_price
error_list.description: Minimum basket price can not be smaller than 49 for coin cashback voucher in TH

error_list.name: follow_prize.name_length_limit
error_list.description: please input up to 20 characters of follow prize name

error_list.name: follow_prize.percentage_RANGE
error_list.description: Please enter a value between 1 and 99

error_list.name: follow_prize.end_time_min_limit
error_list.description: The end time must be greater than the start time by at least 1 day

error_list.name: follow_prize.quota_out_range
error_list.description: Please enter a value between 1 and 200000

error_list.name: follow_prize.start_time_min_limit
error_list.description: Please enter a start time later than the current time

error_list.name: follow_prize.time_future_limit
error_list.description: The start/end time should not exceed 2037-12-31 23:59:59

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_end_time_later
error_list.description: Promotion end time can only be changed to an earlier timing.

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_expired_campaign
error_list.description: The expired follow prize can't be updated.

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_min_spend_ongoing
error_list.description: Minimum Basket Price can't be updated which is ongoing

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_prize_name_ongoing
error_list.description: Cannot rename follow prize name which is ongoing

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_quantity_reduce
error_list.description: Cannot reduce dispatch quantity.

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_start_time_earlier
error_list.description: Promotion start time can only be changed to a later timing.

error_list.name: follow_prize.update_start_time_ongoing
error_list.description: Cannot update start time which is ongoing

error_list.name: voucher.voucher_max_discount_low_quality
error_list.description: To attract buyers to use your voucher, please increase maximum discount price to > {percentage_input*min_spend*0.01} or reduce minimum basket price to < {max_discount*100/percentage_input} to ensure buyers can enjoy the percentage discount configured.

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

request_params.name: follow_prize_name
request_params.description: The name of the follow prize,The follow prize name length max limit is 20.

request_params.name: campaign_id
request_params.description: The unique identifier for the created follow prize.

request_params.name: start_time
request_params.description: The timing from when the follow prize is valid,the start time later than the current time.If the start time and end time passed in by the seller overlap with other upcoming/ongoing activities, it will prompt "Another Follow Prize voucher already exists during this time period, please set another period."

request_params.name: end_time
request_params.description: The timing until when the follow prize is still valid,the end time must be greater than the start time by at least 1 day and end time cannot exceed 3 months after start time.If the start time and end time passed in by the seller overlap with other upcoming/ongoing activities, it will prompt "Another Follow Prize voucher already exists during this time period, please set another period."

request_params.name: min_spend
request_params.description: The minimum spend required for using this follow prize.

children.description: The unique identifier for the created follow prize.
children.name: campagin_id

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
The identifier of the API request for error tracking.
